title: Ultimate Gacha
description: A mod based on the power of the main character from: Backstabbed in a Backwater Dungeon: My Party Tried to Kill Me, But Thanks to an Infinite Gacha I Got LVL 9999 Friends and am Out for Revenge.
body:
# Welcome To Ultimate Gacha

- Based on the manga; Backstabbed in a Backwater Dungeon: My Party Tried to Kill Me, But Thanks to an Infinite Gacha I Got LVL 9999 Friends and am Out for Revenge, this mod adds the main character lights power in the form of a gem allowing you to roll the "~~Infinite~~ Ultimate Gacha" for many powerful rewards from an moldy apple to stunning spells.

- This mod is currently **creative only** as the gem has no natural obtainment

- This mod is a project im making for a server with friends so it may end up receiving **slow updates** and may be **unbalanced**... **HOWEVER** if this mod gains any traction i may begin to work on it more and possibly get a way for enjoyers of the mod to get in contact to voice their opinions about the mod
